Library.XMLDescription: View: Interface pro všechny segmenty ITSM
Library.Command:
SET ANSI_NULLS ON GO SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON GO
-- ============================================= -- Author: Aleš Procházka -- Create date: 2026-01-20 -- Description: Interface pro všechny segmenty ITSM -- =============================================
#MODIFIER# VIEW #NAME# AS
SELECT itsmReq.ID , itsmReq.ID AS SourceID , 'ITSMRequest' AS SourceFormIdent , CONCAT(itsmReq.ID, '#', 'ITSMRequest') AS UniqueSourceIdent , itsmReq.ITSMKey AS ITSMKey , itsmReq.[Subject] , COALESCE(itsmReq.ITSMCategoryLevel5Ident, itsmReq.ITSMCategoryLevel4Ident, itsmReq.ITSMCategoryLevel3Ident, itsmReq.ITSMCategoryLevel2Ident, itsmReq.ITSMCompanyIdent) AS LastFolderTreeIdent , itsmReq.ParentTableID FROM usr.ITSMRequest as itsmReq WHERE itsmReq.[State] != 0
UNION ALL
SELECT itsmInc.ID , itsmInc.ID AS SourceID , 'ITSMIncident' AS SourceFormIdent , CONCAT(itsmInc.ID, '#', 'ITSMIncident') AS UniqueSourceIdent , itsmInc.ITSMKey AS ITSMKey , itsmInc.[Subject] , COALESCE(itsmInc.ITSMCategoryLevel5Ident, itsmInc.ITSMCategoryLevel4Ident, itsmInc.ITSMCategoryLevel3Ident, itsmInc.ITSMCategoryLevel2Ident, itsmInc.ITSMCompanyIdent) AS LastFolderTreeIdent , NULL--itsmInc.ParentTableID FROM usr.ITSMIncident as itsmInc WHERE itsmInc.[State] != 0
UNION ALL
SELECT itsmSupReq.ID , itsmSupReq.ID AS SourceID , 'ITSMSupplierRequest' AS SourceFormIdent , CONCAT(itsmSupReq.ID, '#', 'ITSMSupplierRequest') AS UniqueSourceIdent , itsmSupReq.ITSMKey AS ITSMKey , itsmSupReq.[Subject] , COALESCE(itsmSupReq.ITSMCategoryLevel5Ident, itsmSupReq.ITSMCategoryLevel4Ident, itsmSupReq.ITSMCategoryLevel3Ident, itsmSupReq.ITSMCategoryLevel2Ident, itsmSupReq.ITSMCompanyIdent) AS LastFolderTreeIdent , NULL--itsmSupReq.ParentTableID FROM usr.ITSMSupplierRequest as itsmSupReq WHERE itsmSupReq.[State] != 0
UNION ALL
SELECT itsmSecInc.ID , itsmSecInc.ID AS SourceID , 'ITSMSecurityIncident' AS SourceFormIdent , CONCAT(itsmSecInc.ID, '#', 'ITSMSecurityIncident') AS UniqueSourceIdent , itsmSecInc.ITSMKey AS ITSMKey , itsmSecInc.[Subject] , COALESCE(itsmSecInc.ITSMCategoryLevel5Ident, itsmSecInc.ITSMCategoryLevel4Ident, itsmSecInc.ITSMCategoryLevel3Ident, itsmSecInc.ITSMCategoryLevel2Ident, itsmSecInc.ITSMCompanyIdent) AS LastFolderTreeIdent , NULL--itsmSecInc.ParentTableID FROM usr.ITSMSecurityIncident as itsmSecInc WHERE itsmSecInc.[State] != 0
UNION ALL
SELECT itsmCha.ID , itsmCha.ID AS SourceID , 'ITSMChange' AS SourceFormIdent , CONCAT(itsmCha.ID, '#', 'ITSMChange') AS UniqueSourceIdent , itsmCha.ITSMKey AS ITSMKey , itsmCha.[Subject] , COALESCE(itsmCha.ITSMCategoryLevel5Ident, itsmCha.ITSMCategoryLevel4Ident, itsmCha.ITSMCategoryLevel3Ident, itsmCha.ITSMCategoryLevel2Ident, itsmCha.ITSMCompanyIdent) AS LastFolderTreeIdent , NULL--itsmCha.ParentTableID FROM usr.ITSMChange as itsmCha WHERE itsmCha.[State] != 0
UNION ALL
SELECT itsmRel.ID , itsmRel.ID AS SourceID , 'ITSMRelease' AS SourceFormIdent , CONCAT(itsmRel.ID, '#', 'ITSMRelease') AS UniqueSourceIdent , itsmRel.ITSMKey AS ITSMKey , itsmRel.[ReleaseName] , COALESCE(itsmRel.ITSMCategoryLevel5Ident, itsmRel.ITSMCategoryLevel4Ident, itsmRel.ITSMCategoryLevel3Ident, itsmRel.ITSMCategoryLevel2Ident, itsmRel.ITSMCompanyIdent) AS LastFolderTreeIdent , NULL--itsmRel.ParentTableID FROM usr.ITSMRelease as itsmRel WHERE itsmRel.[State] != 0
UNION ALL
SELECT itsmPro.ID , itsmPro.ID AS SourceID , 'ITSMProblem' AS SourceFormIdent , CONCAT(itsmPro.ID, '#', 'ITSMProblem') AS UniqueSourceIdent , itsmPro.ITSMKey AS ITSMKey , itsmPro.[Subject] , COALESCE(itsmPro.ITSMCategoryLevel5Ident, itsmPro.ITSMCategoryLevel4Ident, itsmPro.ITSMCategoryLevel3Ident, itsmPro.ITSMCategoryLevel2Ident, itsmPro.ITSMCompanyIdent) AS LastFolderTreeIdent , NULL--itsmPro.ParentTableID FROM usr.ITSMProblem as itsmPro WHERE itsmPro.[State] != 0
UNION ALL
SELECT itsmIno.ID , itsmIno.ID AS SourceID , 'ITSMInovation' AS SourceFormIdent , CONCAT(itsmIno.ID, '#', 'ITSMInovation') AS UniqueSourceIdent , itsmIno.ITSMKey AS ITSMKey , itsmIno.[Subject] , COALESCE(itsmIno.ITSMCategoryLevel5Ident, itsmIno.ITSMCategoryLevel4Ident, itsmIno.ITSMCategoryLevel3Ident, itsmIno.ITSMCategoryLevel2Ident, itsmIno.ITSMCompanyIdent) AS LastFolderTreeIdent , NULL--itsmIno.ParentTableID FROM usr.ITSMInovation as itsmIno WHERE itsmIno.[State] != 0
